description: Coherence rules for the DSLO Deterministic Semantic Layered Orchestration.

semantic_structural_alignment: semantic rules must reference valid structural components
graphs must align with declared semantic interpretation rules
nodes must conform to semantic atomicity constraints
invariant_semantic_alignment: semantic rules may not contradict invariants
taxonomy_corpus_alignment: taxonomy terms must map to existing corpus items
corpus items must reference valid taxonomy terms
mapping_crosswalk_alignment: internal mappings must not contradict external crosswalks
external crosswalks must not override internal invariants

notes: This v0.1 coherence block defines cross-component alignment rules ensuring global substrate consistency.
